rationale: The Russia-Ukraine war continues at its established high baseline; Trump's rhetoric on Iran deal and Beirut strikes signals continued fragmentation of US diplomatic attention, a mild ongoing concern for Ukraine's support pipeline.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues (active combat)
top_events.summary: War continues at high intensity with no qualitative change this cycle — ongoing threat to life, infrastructure, and territory for all Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Trump's continued focus on Middle East diplomacy and criticism of Israel signals US diplomatic bandwidth remains divided — a mild ongoing concern for Ukraine's Western support continuity.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: A human-interest story about Russian grief — no direct military or policy impact on Ukraine, but signals the scale of Russian casualties and societal war fatigue.
